description: CPT codes for Immunohistochemistry (IHC) and Fluorescence In Situ Hybridization (FISH) tests

codes.label: Immunohistochemistry, each additional single antibody stain procedure
Immunohistochemistry or immunocytochemistry, per specimen; initial single antibody stain procedure
Immunohistochemistry or immunocytochemistry, each multiplex antibody stain procedure
Morphometric analysis, tumor immunohistochemistry (e.g., Her-2/neu, estrogen receptor/progesterone receptor)
Morphometric analysis, tumor immunohistochemistry, computer-assisted, each additional antibody stain procedure
Molecular cytogenetics; chromosomal in situ hybridization, analyze 3-5 cells
Molecular cytogenetics; chromosomal in situ hybridization, analyze 10-30 cells
Molecular cytogenetics; interphase in situ hybridization, analyze 25-99 cells
Molecular cytogenetics; interphase in situ hybridization, analyze 100-300 cells
Chromosome analysis; additional karyotypes, each study
Cytogenetics and molecular cytogenetics, interpretation and report
